signals.headline: Trump Announces 10-Day Ceasefire Between Israel and Lebanon | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Announces 10-Day Ceasefire Between Israel and Lebanon | YES | HIGH confidence**  
On April 16, 2026, US President Donald Trump announced a 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, set to begin at 5 p.m. ET, targeting Iran-backed Hezbollah strikes that have killed over 2,000 in Lebanon and complicating US-Iran talks.[5][8]  
This follows the initial US-Iran two-week ceasefire on April 8 (
